assumptions_used: FIB (FAAM) has >40 years of experience — exact founding year and history not confirmed
FIB headquarters in Monterubbiano, Marche — location not confirmed in evidence store
FIB employs approximately 500 staff — employee count not confirmed in evidence store
Iron phosphate and lithium carbonate sourced from European or diversified non-Chinese suppliers — specific supplier agreements not in evidence
Annual production capacity 10,000-30,000 tonnes — exact design capacity not specified in project context
OEE target >92% — benchmark estimate based on DT-enabled manufacturing, not confirmed for this specific plant
open_issues: FIB/FAAM corporate details (founding year, exact employee count, headquarters location, revenue) need to be confirmed by the applicant
Eni Brindisi site details (exact location coordinates, site area, existing infrastructure specifics, brownfield remediation status) need to be provided
Exact production capacity (tonnes/year) needs to be confirmed — this affects GHG calculations and cost efficiency ratio
Specific raw material supplier agreements and off-take contracts are not evidenced
Key personnel CVs and track records need to be incorporated
FIB-Eni governance structure and contractual framework details to be provided
